alerts.title: Others category exploded 1,484% this month
alerts.description: The 'Others' category jumped from ₹45,029 last month to ₹7,13,212 this month — a 1,484% spike. The top contributors are an unverified UPI transaction cluster (₹4,69,910 across 47 transactions) and a suspicious ₹99,999 transfer labelled 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank', which resembles a phishing or fraud transaction.

alerts.title: Suspicious ₹99,999 bank 'account update' transaction
alerts.description: A single ₹99,999 payment to 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank' was made once this month. This label is not a legitimate merchant name and may indicate a fraudulent UPI transaction — verify this immediately with your bank.

alerts.title: Food & Dining up 64% — Zomato and Pizza Express driving costs
alerts.description: Food & Dining rose from ₹5,151 last month to ₹8,444 this month (63.9% increase). Zomato alone accounts for ₹4,028 across 5 orders, and a single Pizza Express visit cost ₹2,853.

alerts.title: Shopping jumped 170% to ₹13,831 this month
alerts.description: Shopping spend surged from ₹5,131 last month to ₹13,831 this month, well above the 3-month average of ₹14,597. Amazon Pay E-Commerce (₹6,004) and Blinkit (₹4,416 across 2 orders) are the primary contributors.

tips: Immediately contact HDFC Bank to verify the ₹99,999 transaction labelled 'View: Account Update For Your HDFC Bank' — this does not match any legitimate merchant and may be a fraud or phishing payment.

Review your 47 UPI transactions totalling ₹4,69,910 flagged under the unrecognised merchant '❗ You Have Done A UPI Txn. Check Detail' — categorise and audit these to identify any unauthorised or duplicate payments.

You spent ₹4,028 on Zomato across 5 orders this month (avg ₹806/order). Cooking at home just 2–3 of those meals could save approximately ₹1,500–₹2,000 monthly and bring Food & Dining back closer to the ₹5,150 level from last month.

Your Googleplay subscription costs ₹429/month — review active subscriptions within Google Play to check for unused app subscriptions or auto-renewing services that can be cancelled, potentially saving ₹200–₹429/month.

Blinkit spend was ₹4,416 across just 2 orders this month (avg ₹2,208/order). Consolidating grocery runs into weekly bulk purchases on Amazon Grocery (where you're already spending) could reduce impulse delivery fees and per-item costs by an estimated ₹1,000–₹1,500/month.
